name: multi-company-portal
description: Multi-company login portal that hosts the FinTrack financial app per tenant, with master/staff accounts.
whatsNew: Performance fix: stopped a background sync loop that was constantly writing to the database — the app now saves only when data actually changes, which sharply cuts server load and disk use.
Bank cards have a new Block / Unblock button: a blocked bank is forced inactive and can't be made active again until you unblock it.
The app is now named "DRW" — you'll see it as the browser title and under the app icon when you install it to your home screen.
